title: Introduction to Paninian Grammar
label: प्रवेशः
description: The essential concepts you need before any prakriya. We build understanding step by step.

title: Alphabet & Sounds
label: वर्णाः
description: Learn the Sanskrit alphabet and sound system.

title: धातुपरिचयः — Meeting the Root
label: धातुः
description: What is a @term[dhātu]? How are roots listed and organized? A short bridge between abstract grammar concepts and your first verb derivation.

title: लट् — Present
label: लट्
description: Derive @deva[लट्] (present tense) verb forms — the most common @deva[तिङन्त] forms you'll encounter.

title: Simple Sentences
label: वाक्यम्
description: Read your first Sanskrit sentences with present tense verbs.

title: लोट् — Imperative
label: लोट्
description: Derive @deva[लोट्] forms for commands, invitations, and blessings.

title: Reading Practice: Simple Sentences
label: अभ्यासः १
description: Apply what you've learned to read simple prose.

title: लङ् — Imperfect
label: लङ्
description: Derive @deva[लङ्] (@term[anadyatana] @term[bhūta]) forms with the @term[āgama] @deva[अट्].

title: More Present Tense
label: क्रियाः
description: Learn all three persons and numbers for present tense verbs.

title: विधिलिङ् — Optative
label: विधिलिङ्
description: Derive @deva[विधिलिङ्] forms expressing commands, wishes, and possibilities.

title: Nominative & Accusative
label: प्रथमा
description: Master the two most common cases — subject and object.

title: दशगणाः — The Ten Verb Classes
label: गणाः
description: Learn how the 10 @term[dhātu] classes (@term[gaṇa]) affect verb conjugation. Each @term[gaṇa] has its own @term[vikaraṇa].

title: Reading Practice: Narrative
label: अभ्यासः २
description: Read narrative prose with subjects, objects, and verbs.

title: लृट् — Simple Future
label: लृट्
description: Derive @deva[लृट्] (@term[bhaviṣyat]) forms. The first @term[ārdhadhātuka] @deva[लकार] — different @term[vikaraṇa] and ending patterns.

title: Instrumental Case
label: तृतीया
description: Express "by means of" or "with" using the third case.

title: लुट् — Periphrastic Future
label: लुट्
description: Derive @deva[लुट्] (@term[anadyatana] @term[bhaviṣyat]) forms using @deva[तासि]. Agent-noun based future formation.

title: Dative Case
label: चतुर्थी
description: Express purpose and recipients with the fourth case.

title: लिट् — Perfect
label: लिट्
description: Derive @deva[लिट्] (@term[parokṣa]) forms with @term[abhyāsa] (reduplication). Unique doubling rules and special endings.

title: Reading Practice: Subhāṣitas
label: अभ्यासः ३
description: Read wisdom verses using all four cases learned so far.

title: लुङ् — Aorist
label: लुङ्
description: Derive @deva[लुङ्] (@term[bhūta]) forms. Seven aorist varieties — the most complex @deva[लकार].

title: Past Tense (laṅ)
label: लङ्
description: Read about past events with the imperfect tense.

title: आशीर्लिङ् — Benedictive
label: आशीर्लिङ्
description: Derive @deva[आशीर्लिङ्] forms expressing blessings and wishes. This special @deva[लिङ्] has distinctive @term[ārdhadhātuka] formation.

title: Reading Practice: Narrative
label: अभ्यासः ४
description: Read continuous narrative using past tense.

title: लृङ् — Conditional
label: लृङ्
description: Derive @deva[लृङ्] forms expressing "would have" — unrealized conditions and hypotheticals.

title: Genitive & Ablative
label: षष्ठी
description: Express possession and source with the fifth and sixth cases.

title: क्त्वा / ल्यप् — Absolutive
label: क्त्वा
description: Derive @deva[क्त्वान्त] forms (having done X). @deva[क्त्वा] and @deva[ल्यप्] create @term[avyaya] forms expressing prior action.

title: Locative Case
label: सप्तमी
description: Express location and time with the seventh case.

title: तुमुन् — Infinitive
label: तुमुन्
description: Derive @deva[तुमन्त] (infinitive) forms. The @deva[तुमुन्] @term[pratyaya] creates purpose expressions.

title: Vowel Sandhi
label: स्वरसन्धिः
description: Understand how vowels merge at word boundaries.

title: शतृ / शानच् — Present Participles
label: शतृ
description: Derive @term[sat] (@deva[शतृ] and @deva[शानच्]) @term[kṛdanta]. Verbal adjectives for ongoing action.

title: Reading Practice: Verses
label: अभ्यासः ५
description: Read Sanskrit verses, splitting sandhi as you go.

title: क्त / क्तवतु — Past Participles
label: क्त
description: Derive @term[niṣṭhā] forms — @deva[क्त] (past passive) and @deva[क्तवतु] (past active). Essential @term[kṛdanta] for completed actions.

title: Simple Compounds
label: समासः
description: Recognize and split common compound types.

title: तव्य / अनीय / य — Gerundives
label: तव्य
description: Derive @term[kṛtya] (@deva[तव्य], @deva[अनीय], @deva[य]) expressing necessity or obligation. Essential for @term[vidhi].

title: Reading Practice: Kāvya
label: अभ्यासः ६
description: Read verses from Kālidāsa's Meghadūta.

title: मतुप् / वतुप् — Possessive Suffixes
label: मतुब्वतुबौ
description: Derive possessive @term[taddhita] with @deva[मतुप्] and @deva[वतुप्]. "Having X" — @deva[धीमत्], @deva[बलवत्].

title: Participles
label: कृदन्तम्
description: Verbal adjectives that describe actions completed or ongoing.

title: त्व / तल् — Abstract Noun Suffixes
label: त्वतलौ
description: Derive abstract @term[taddhita] with @deva[त्व] and @deva[तल्]. Create "-ness/-ity" forms like @deva[गुरुत्व], @deva[गुरुता].

title: Visarga Sandhi
label: विसर्गः
description: How the visarga changes before different sounds.

title: अण् / ठक् — Relational Suffixes
label: अण्ठक्
description: Derive relational @term[taddhita] expressing @term[apatya], origin, or connection. Patronymics, place-derivatives.

title: Reading Practice: Extended Passage
label: समाप्तिः
description: Apply everything you've learned to read an extended passage.

title: प्रातिपदिक — Nominal Stems
label: प्रातिपदिकम्
description: Understand @term[prātipadika] before adding @term[sup]. What qualifies as a @term[prātipadika] and how stems are classified.

title: Reader: First Steps
label: पाठः १
description: Read two complete Sanskrit sentences with full word-by-word analysis. No sandhi, present tense only.

title: अकारान्त — A-stem Declension
label: अकारान्तपुंनपुंसकम्
description: Master @deva[अकारान्त] @term[prātipadika] — @term[puṃliṅga] and @term[napuṃsakaliṅga] stems like @deva[देव], @deva[फल].

title: Reader: A Subhāṣita
label: पाठः २
description: Read a complete Sanskrit maxim (subhāṣita) with vowel sandhi and instrumental case.

title: आकारान्त — Ā-stem Declension
label: आकारान्तस्त्री
description: Decline @term[strīliṅga] @deva[आ]-stems like @deva[सेना], @deva[विद्या], @deva[कन्या]. The primary feminine pattern.

title: Reader: Pañcatantra Narrative
label: पाठः ३
description: Read a connected Pañcatantra passage with past tense, sandhi, and compound words.

title: इकारान्त / उकारान्त — I/U-stem Declension
label: इकारोकारान्तम्
description: Decline @deva[इ]/[@deva[उ]-stems (@deva[अग्नि], @deva[गुरु]). Important patterns with @term[guṇa] and @term[yaṇ] changes.

title: हलन्त — Consonant Stem Declension
label: हलन्तम्
description: Decline @term[hal]-ending @term[prātipadika] — complex patterns with @term[sandhi] and strong/weak alternation.

title: कारकम् — Semantic Roles
label: कारकम्
description: Understand the six @term[kāraka] — the semantic roles linking @term[subanta] to @term[kriyā]. Foundation of case syntax.

title: समासः — Compound Formation
label: समासः
description: Learn the four main @term[samāsa] types. How @term[pada] combine to form new semantic units.

title: अच्सन्धि — Vowel Sandhi
label: स्वरसन्धिः
description: Master @term[ac] (vowel) @term[sandhi] rules. When @term[svara] meet at @term[pada] boundaries, these rules apply.

title: विसर्गसन्धि — Visarga Sandhi
label: विसर्गसन्धिः
description: Learn @term[visarga] @term[sandhi] rules. How final @deva[-स्] and @deva[-र्] transform at @term[pada] junctions.

title: हल्सन्धि — Consonant Sandhi
label: व्यञ्जनसन्धिः
description: Master @term[hal] (@term[vyañjana]) @term[sandhi] rules. How stops, nasals, and other consonants interact.

title: Prakriyā: Derive भवति
label: प्र॰भवति
description: Trace the complete rule-by-rule derivation of भवति from root भू. See the Ashtadhyayi work as a derivation engine.

title: Prakriyā: Derive कृत्वा
label: प्र॰कृत्वा
description: Trace the derivation of कृत्वा "having done" — the absolutive form showing kṛt suffix attachment.

title: Prakriyā: Derive गच्छति
label: प्र॰गच्छति
description: Trace the derivation of गच्छति (he goes) — a root that undergoes a special stem substitution before the class affix.

title: Prakriyā: Derive अकरोत्
label: प्र॰अकरोत्
description: Trace the derivation of अकरोत् "he did" — the imperfect showing augment and secondary endings.

title: Prakriyā: Derive नयति
label: प्र॰नयति
description: Trace the derivation of नयति "he leads" — showing guṇa and yaṇ-sandhi in action.

title: Prakriyā: Derive बभूव
label: प्र॰बभूव
description: Trace the derivation of बभूव "he was/became" — the perfect tense showing reduplication.

title: Prakriyā: Derive रामस्य
label: प्र॰रामस्य
description: Trace the derivation of रामस्य (of Rāma) from stem to finished word. See how nominal forms are built.

title: Prakaraṇa: The It-saṃjñā System
label: इत्संज्ञा
description: Deep dive into how Pāṇini's marker letters (it) encode grammatical information. Eight rules that power the entire system.

title: Prakaraṇa: The Sandhi System
label: सन्धिः
description: Deep dive into Pāṇini's sound-combination rules. How @term[ac] and @term[hal] interact at morpheme and word boundaries.

title: Prakaraṇa: The Saṃjñā System
label: संज्ञा
description: Deep dive into Pāṇini's technical terminology — the definitional foundation of the Aṣṭādhyāyī.

title: Prakaraṇa: The Ātmanepada System
label: आत्मनेपद
description: Deep dive into Pāṇini's voice assignment — when verbs take ātmanepada vs. parasmaipada endings.

title: Prakaraṇa: The Kāraka System
label: कारक
description: Deep dive into Pāṇini's semantic role system — the kārakas that connect meaning to case endings.

title: Prakaraṇa: The Tripādī
label: त्रिपादी
description: Deep dive into the final three pādas of the Aṣṭādhyāyī — the special domain where rules operate "invisibly."

title: Read Adhyāya 1, Pāda 1
label: 1.1 पाठः
description: Sequential reading of the saṃjñā-paribhāṣā foundation: vowel grades, sound classes, and the core definitions that all later rules depend on.

title: Read Adhyāya 1, Pāda 3
label: 1.3 पाठः
description: The it-saṃjñā rules: how marker letters in affixes encode grammatical information, and the voice assignment (parasmaipada/ātmanepada) rules.

title: Lesson 0: Script & Sounds
label: Lesson 0
description: Telugu script · pronunciation · sandhi basics

label: Lesson 37
description: @deva[लिङ्ग] @deva[अनुसार] @deva[शब्द]; @deva[अव्यय]

title: Thirty-Eighth Lesson
label: Lesson 38
description: @deva[द्विवचन] @deva[सर्वनाम] और @deva[तिङन्त] (@[as, kṛ, bhū]); @deva[रामायण] @deva[पाठ]
